name: Misty Kiss
descrip: Breathe a sweet aphrodisiac with a kiss. Has a high chance to crit.
outcome: [AttackerName] lovingly kisses [TargetName] while their tongues intertwine, before breathing a sweet mist of magical aphrodisiacs into [TargetHisOrHer] mouth!
miss: [AttackerName] lovingly kisses [TargetName] while their tongues intertwine, before breathing a sweet mist of magical aphrodisiacs into [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] flushes deeply as the aphrodisiac slowly takes hold!
